summary: The diff implements REQ-22 by adding a 'News & Views' category section to the homepage bottom sections. The file summary for frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx explicitly states that 'category spotlight sections now always render for all four categories (Startups & Funding, News & Views, Interviews, Market Trends), showing a skeleton during loading and an empty-state message when no articles exist, instead of being skipped entirely.' This covers all acceptance criteria: four sections displayed, News & Views section with published articles, a 'More' link to the category page, matching layout/styling, and empty state handling.
